name: HighScope Indonesia

campuses.name: Main Campus
campuses.address: Jl. TB. Simatupang No. 8, Cilandak Barat, Jakarta Selatan 12430, Indonesia

intelligence.verdict: Indonesian-founded school with American-influenced curriculum. Multiple levels, Cilandak campus. Mid-range fees, bilingual approach.
paragraphs: Indonesian-founded school with American-influenced curriculum. Multiple levels, Cilandak campus. Mid-range fees, bilingual approach.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$4.9K – US$14K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: Multiple campuses across Jakarta, Science laboratories, Computer labs, Libraries, Sports facilities.

metaDescription: HighScope Indonesia (South Jakarta). Indonesian-founded school with American-influenced curriculum. Multiple levels, Cilandak campus. Mid-range fees, bilingual approach.…
